errors.emailInUse: An account already exists with this email.

action.invalidLinkMessage: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

action.verifyFailedMessage: The verification link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new email.

social.twitter: Follow Teranga Events on Twitter / X

hero.srTitle: Discover events across Senegal — conferences, concerts, workshops and festivals
hero.subtitle: Conferences, concerts, workshops and meetups across Senegal. See what's happening this season in Dakar, Thiès, Saly and beyond.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search an event, an organiser, a city…

featured.title: Three events you really shouldn't miss
featured.subtitle: Hand-picked by the Teranga editors, among the most anticipated events of Spring 2026 in Dakar and on the Petite Côte.

browse.title: Browse the season
browse.subtitle: Filter by category, city or budget.

one.title: Register in 45 seconds
one.description: One number, one ticket. Wave and Orange Money accepted; pay-on-arrival supported on some events.

two.title: Offline QR badge
two.description: Your ticket stays available without network. Handy at the door, handy off the grid.

three.title: Reminders on WhatsApp
three.description: One message 24h before, another at H-1. Nothing more, nothing less.

simpleReg.title: Simple registration
simpleReg.description: Pick your ticket and register in seconds.

qrBadge.title: Secure QR badge
qrBadge.description: Your signed QR-coded digital badge for fast, reliable entry.

community.title: Community
community.description: Join the Senegalese and West African event community.

howItWorks.heading: Three steps, one badge
howItWorks.subheading: From the first click to the door: everything is tuned so nothing stands between you and the event.

step1.title: Discover
step1.description: Browse upcoming events in Dakar and across Senegal

step2.title: Register
step2.description: Pick your ticket and register in a few clicks

step3.title: Attend
step3.description: Show your QR badge and enjoy the event

organizerCta.heading: Organizing an event?
organizerCta.body: Create it for free on Teranga and reach thousands of attendees

event_cancelled.description: This event has been cancelled by the organizer. Discover other upcoming events instead.

event_archived.title: Event archived
event_archived.description: This event is no longer available. Browse the calendar for an equivalent.

registerFlow.subtitle: Registration

registerFlow.verificationResent: Verification link resent. Check your inbox.
registerFlow.verificationResendError: Couldn’t send the email. Please try again in a few minutes.

pendingPayment.title: Payment incomplete
pendingPayment.description: Your registration is on hold: finish the payment to confirm it. You can resume the open payment session or cancel and try again.
pendingPayment.cancelConfirm: Cancel this pending registration? You will be able to register again right after.
pendingPayment.cancelSuccess: Registration cancelled. You can now register again.
pendingPayment.noPaymentLinkedError: This registration is not linked to any payment. Cancel it and try again.
pendingPayment.resumeFailed: Could not resume the payment. Cancel and try again.

pendingApproval.title: Awaiting approval
pendingApproval.description: The organiser is reviewing your registration. You will be notified as soon as it is confirmed.

waitlisted.title: On the waitlist
waitlisted.description: You are on the waitlist. If a seat opens up, you will be promoted automatically.

checkedIn.title: You have already entered
checkedIn.description: Your badge was scanned at the event entrance.

registerFlow.seatsLeft: {count, plural, one {# seat left} other {# seats left}}

registerFlow.approvalNotice: This registration is subject to organizer approval.

summary.refundNote: Refundable up to 48h before the event, minus fees.

success.headline: Your spot is reserved. See you soon.

paymentStatus.successHint: Your registration has been confirmed and your QR badge is ready.
paymentStatus.failedFallback: The payment could not be processed. Please try again.
paymentStatus.receiptError: Couldn’t generate the receipt. Please try again in a moment.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel registration
cancelDialog.description: Are you sure you want to cancel this registration? This action is irreversible.

refundDialog.title: Request a refund
refundDialog.description: The refund will be processed according to the organizer's policy. Processing typically takes 5-10 business days.

notifications.heading: Notifications
notifications.pushDescription: Receive real-time alerts on your device
notifications.emailDescription: Receive summaries and confirmations by email
notifications.emailTransactionalDescription: Registration confirmations, event reminders, badge ready notices
notifications.emailOrganizationalDescription: Team invitations, role changes, and organization updates
notifications.mandatoryEmailNote: Security emails (sign-in, password reset) and payment receipts are always sent and cannot be disabled.
notifications.remindersDescription: Get a reminder before your events start
notifications.detailedLinkDescription: Turn each notification on or off individually

preferences.title: Detailed notifications
preferences.subtitle: Turn each notification type on or off individually. Security and billing alerts always stay on.
preferences.emptyDescription: Check back later, our catalog grows regularly.
preferences.errorLoadingDescription: Check your connection and try again in a moment.
preferences.mandatoryTooltip: This notification is required for your security.
preferences.unsavedCount: {count, plural, one {# unsaved change} other {# unsaved changes}}
preferences.pauseAllMarketingDescription: Disables every marketing notification in one click. You can re-enable them individually below.

categories.authDescription: Sign-ins, email verifications and password changes.
categories.transactionalDescription: Registrations, badges and confirmations for your events.
categories.billingDescription: Payments, receipts and subscriptions. These alerts remain mandatory.
categories.organizationalDescription: Team invites, role changes and organization activity.
categories.marketingDescription: Product updates, tips and offers. Opt out any time.

privacy.heading: Privacy
privacy.description: Control your profile visibility and interactions
privacy.profileVisibleDescription: Other attendees will be able to see your name and profile at events
privacy.dmAllowedDescription: Other attendees will be able to send you messages

account.heading: Account
account.deleteConfirmQuestion: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
account.deleteConfirmWarning: This action is irreversible. All your data, registrations and messages will be permanently deleted.
account.deleteContactSupport: Please contact support to delete your account: support@teranga-events.com

feed.title: Activity feed
feed.beFirstToShare: Be the first to share a post with attendees.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.errorDescription: We couldn’t fetch your notifications. Please try again in a moment.

bell.errorMessage: Couldn’t load notifications. Please try again later.

permission_banner.title: Turn on push notifications
permission_banner.body: Get event reminders, confirmations and updates in this browser — even when Teranga isn't open.
permission_banner.denied_help: You have blocked notifications for Teranga. To turn them back on, open your browser settings and allow notifications for this site.

registration.failure: Couldn't turn on notifications. Please try again.
registration.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please try again in an hour.
registration.unsupported: Your browser doesn't support push notifications.

revoke.success: Push notifications turned off on this browser.

prefs.title: My notification preferences
prefs.subtitle: Choose which notifications land on which channel — email, in-app, push and SMS. Security and billing alerts always stay on.
prefs.emptyDescription: Check back later, our catalog grows regularly.
prefs.errorLoadingDescription: Check your connection and try again in a moment.
prefs.saveError: Couldn’t save your changes. Please try again.
prefs.quietHoursDescription: Non-urgent notifications queue during this range and deliver after. Mandatory alerts (security, payment) always get through.
prefs.quietHoursTooltip: Times are interpreted in your current timezone.
prefs.categoriesDescription: Coarse switches for each email family. Combined with the per-notification toggles below.
prefs.perKeyDescription: One switch per supported channel for each notification.
prefs.mandatoryTooltip: This notification is required for your security.
prefs.pushDisabledTooltip: Enable push notifications in the banner above to use this channel.
prefs.testSendAria: Send a preview of {name} to my inbox
prefs.testSendMandatoryTooltip: Mandatory notifications cannot be tested from this page.
prefs.testSendRateLimited: You’ve reached the test limit (5/hour). Try again later.
prefs.testSendNotOptable: This notification is mandatory and cannot be simulated.

faq.metaDescription: Answers to frequently asked questions about Teranga Events: registrations, tickets, QR badges, refunds and more.
faq.title: Help & FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions about the platform.
faq.comingSoonBody: We’re putting together a full FAQ covering registrations, payments, QR badges and more.
faq.contactPrefix: In the meantime, reach out if you have questions:

upcomingSections.register: How do I register for an event?
upcomingSections.qr: How does the QR badge work?
upcomingSections.contact: How do I contact the organizer?
upcomingSections.confirmationEmail: What if I don’t receive my confirmation email?

unknown.title: An unexpected error occurred
unknown.description: Please try again in a moment. If the problem persists, contact support.

TIMEOUT.title: Connection too slow
TIMEOUT.description: The request timed out. Check your connection and try again.

INTERNAL_ERROR.title: Internal error
INTERNAL_ERROR.description: Something went wrong on our side. Our team has been notified — please try again shortly.

UNAUTHORIZED.title: Sign in required
UNAUTHORIZED.description: You need to be signed in to perform this action.

FORBIDDEN.title: Action not allowed
FORBIDDEN.description: You don't have permission to perform this action.

NOT_FOUND.title: Resource not found
NOT_FOUND.description: What you're looking for no longer exists.

VALIDATION_ERROR.title: Invalid data
VALIDATION_ERROR.description: Please check the information in the form.

CONFLICT.title: Action already performed
CONFLICT.description: This action conflicts with the current state. Refresh the page and try again.

duplicate_registration.title: You're already registered
duplicate_registration.description: You already have an active registration for this event. Find your badge in "My registrations".

RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.title: Too many attempts
RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.description: You've made too many requests. Please wait a moment before trying again.

REGISTRATION_CLOSED.title: Registration unavailable
REGISTRATION_CLOSED.description: Registration isn't open for this event.

event_not_published.title: Registration isn't open yet
event_not_published.description: The organizer is still preparing this event. Check back in a few days.

event_cancelled.title: Event cancelled
event_cancelled.description: This event has been cancelled by the organizer.

event_archived.title: Event archived
event_archived.description: This event is no longer available.

EVENT_FULL.title: Event is full
EVENT_FULL.description: All seats have been taken. Browse other events or check back later.

ZONE_FULL.title: Access zone is full
ZONE_FULL.description: This zone has reached its maximum capacity. Please head to another zone listed on your badge.

EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED.title: Verify your email address
EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED.description: Click the link we sent you to unlock paid registrations.

ORGANIZATION_PLAN_LIMIT.title: Plan limit reached
ORGANIZATION_PLAN_LIMIT.description: This action exceeds your current subscription limits. Upgrade your plan to continue.

QR_INVALID.title: Invalid QR
QR_INVALID.description: This QR code isn't recognized. Check that you're scanning the right badge.

QR_ALREADY_USED.title: Badge already used
QR_ALREADY_USED.description: This badge has already been scanned for this event.

QR_EXPIRED.title: Badge expired
QR_EXPIRED.description: This badge is no longer valid.

QR_NOT_YET_VALID.title: Badge not yet valid
QR_NOT_YET_VALID.description: Try again once the event opens.

addToHomeScreen.bannerTitle: Install Teranga on your home screen
addToHomeScreen.bannerBody: Get faster access to your events and unlock push notifications.
addToHomeScreen.dialogTitle: Add Teranga to your home screen
addToHomeScreen.iosStep1: Tap the Share button (square with an up arrow) in the Safari toolbar.
addToHomeScreen.iosStep2: Scroll and choose "Add to Home Screen".
addToHomeScreen.iosStep3: Tap "Add" in the top right corner.
addToHomeScreen.androidInstructions: Tap "Install" below to add Teranga to your home screen.

cookieConsent.title: Your privacy preferences
cookieConsent.body: Teranga uses analytics and error-tracking cookies to improve the platform. No advertising cookies. You can accept or decline at any time.
